cn_title: Xbox发布会将展示竞品平台，但别指望Helix消息
opus_summary: Xbox内容官Matt Booty确认6月Games Showcase将明确标注游戏登陆的所有平台（包括PlayStation），延续跨平台透明策略。但他明确表示下一代主机Project Helix不会在本次发布会上公布任何消息。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has confirmed it will "continue the precedent" by highlighting competing platforms during its upcoming 2026 Xbox Showcase, but don't expect to hear anything about the next-gen Helix device.
paragraphs.cn: 微软确认将在即将到来的2026 Xbox Showcase上「延续惯例」，展示竞争对手平台的信息——但别指望听到任何关于下一代主机Helix的消息。

paragraphs.en: Xbox chief content officer Matt Booty set the stage during an appearance on the Official Xbox Podcast today. He told players to expect the company to be transparent about what platforms its games are coming to, meaning you'll probably see a PlayStation logo or two pop up when this year's summer Xbox Showcase happens in June.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox首席内容官Matt Booty今天在Official Xbox Podcast节目中定下基调。他告诉玩家，公司会对游戏登陆的平台保持透明——这意味着你很可能会在今年6月的夏季Xbox Showcase上看到PlayStation的标志出现。

paragraphs.en: "We'll be very clear about what platforms a game is coming to and want to continue the precedent," Booty said. "I think we've got a good system going, where we make it clear in Showcase."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们会非常清楚地标明游戏登陆哪些平台，并希望延续这一惯例，」Booty说，「我认为我们已经建立了一套很好的体系，在Showcase上把一切说清楚。」

paragraphs.en: Although Microsoft has signaled an interest in returning to Xbox exclusive titles, its ongoing multiplatform strategy has seen a number of titles in development for PC, PlayStation 5, and Nintendo Switch 2 for years. It means you can still expect games like Fable and Halo: Campaign Evolved to come to PS5, with the Showcase serving as an opportunity to double down on that promise.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管微软已经表示有意回归Xbox独占策略，但其持续推进的跨平台战略意味着多款游戏已经为PC、PlayStation 5和Nintendo Switch 2开发了数年。这意味着你仍然可以期待《神鬼寓言》和《光环：战役进化》登陆PS5，而Showcase正是兑现这一承诺的舞台。

paragraphs.en: As for Helix, Microsoft's mysterious next-gen console, it looks like Microsoft still wants to keep its cards close to its chest. Instead of providing details about the future of its Xbox strategy, the June event will focus on its games.
paragraphs.cn: 至于微软神秘的下一代主机Helix，看起来微软仍然打算守口如瓶。6月的活动不会透露Xbox战略的未来方向，而是将重心放在游戏本身。

paragraphs.en: "We really want to focus on the teams and on the games, and this is not going to be a place where we're going to talk strategy, broadly. There are certainly some strategic things that are out there and things we want to bring clarity to, but the focus here is on the games. For the long term, we want to make the right decisions, not fast decisions."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们真的希望把焦点放在团队和游戏上，这不会是一个广泛讨论战略的场合。当然有些战略层面的事情需要理清，但这里的重点是游戏。从长远来看，我们要做出正确的决定，而不是仓促的决定。」

paragraphs.en: "I can also say that there won't be Helix news, so Helix will not be in this Showcase. Again, we want to get everything about that right."
paragraphs.cn: 「我还可以告诉大家，不会有Helix的消息，Helix不会出现在这次Showcase上。再说一次，我们希望把关于Helix的一切都做对。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft announced a new gaming console was in the works back in June 2025 but didn't go on to give it its Helix codename until March of this year. Little about the device has been confirmed outside of the promise that it will be able to play both Xbox and PC games. For now, we can only expect to learn more later this year.
paragraphs.cn: 微软在2025年6月宣布正在开发一款新主机，但直到今年3月才正式给出Helix的代号。除了承诺它能够运行Xbox和PC游戏之外，关于这台设备几乎没有更多已确认的信息。目前，我们只能期待今年晚些时候了解更多。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft will hold its Xbox Showcase and Gears of War: E-Day Direct June 7.
paragraphs.cn: 微软将于6月7日举办Xbox Showcase和《战争机器：事变日》专场直播。

subtitle: 摊牌了
en_title: Xbox Showcase Will Feature Competing Platforms, But Don't Expect Any Helix News
